request.description:
These `params` control how the **SeLoger Search Export** crawler behaves — including pagination and optional detail‐page visits.

➡️ These parameters are specific to the **SeLoger Search Export** crawler. _Refer to the_ [Constructing the `params` Object](#13eb068f-2bae-4603-941e-9f36038fb379) _section to understand how to format and apply them._

| Parameter                     | Type     | Description                                                                                                       |
| ----------------------------- | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **max_pages**                 | integer  | Maximum number of search‐result pages to crawl (e.g., `4`).                                                        |
| **functions.annonce_details** | boolean  | If `true`, visits each listing’s detail page to fetch the full description, geographic coordinates (lat/lng), and any extra attributes. |

---

### ⚠️ **Additional Notes**

- Enabling **functions.annonce_details** will increase run time, as each listing requires an additional HTTP request.

response.name: Example

request.description:
These `result` objects are returned by the **SeLoger Search Export** crawler.

| **Field** | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **additional_pictures** | string | Comma-separated URLs of extra listing images beyond the main one. |
| **address** | string | Town or locality name for the listing (e.g., “Buchères”). |
| **agency_contact_name** | string | Name of the real-estate agency contact. |
| **agency_has_email** | boolean | `true` if the agency’s email address is available. |
| **agency_id** | integer | Internal SeLoger agency identifier. |
| **agency_img_url** | string or null | URL of the agency’s logo image. |
| **agency_link** | string or null | External link to the agency’s website, if provided. |
| **agency_page** | string | URL of the agency’s SeLoger page. |
| **agency_phone_number** | string | Contact phone number for the agency. |
| **annonce_id** | integer | Unique listing identifier on SeLoger. |
| **area** | number | Surface area in square meters (e.g., `180.147`). |
| **bedrooms_count** | integer or null | Number of bedrooms, if specified. |
| **business_unit** | integer | Internal code for the business unit. |
| **contact_email** | boolean | `true` if a contact email is provided. |
| **contact_is_private_seller** | boolean | `true` if the listing is by a private seller rather than an agency. |
| **coownership_annual_charges** | number or null | Annual co-ownership charges, if applicable. |
| **coownership_is_syndic_procedure** | boolean | `true` if the property is under syndic procedure. |
| **coownership_number_of_lots** | integer or null | Total number of lots in the co-ownership. |
| **description** | string | Full, unabridged listing description. |
| **district** | string or null | District or arrondissement, if available. |
| **dpe** | string or null | Energy Performance Diagnostic rating (e.g., “A”, “B”, etc.). |
| **electricity_consumption** | string or null | Electricity consumption metric, if provided. |
| **estate_type** | string | Type of property (e.g., “Local d'activités”). |
| **estate_type_id** | integer | Numeric code for the estate type. |
| **features** | string or null | Key features or amenities. |
| **functions.annonce_details.filling_date** | string | Timestamp (`DD/MM/YYYY, HH:mm:ss Z`) when detail-page enrichment ran (if enabled). |
| **gas_emissions** | string or null | Greenhouse gas emissions rating, if provided. |
| **highlighting_level** | integer | Prominence level for the listing (higher = more featured). |
| **insee_code** | string or null | INSEE code for French municipalities, if available. |
| **is_exclusive** | boolean | `true` if this is an exclusive listing. |
| **is_expired** | boolean | `true` if the listing is expired. |
| **is_furnished** | boolean | `true` if the property is furnished. |
| **last_scraping_time** | string (ISO) or null | When this listing was last scraped (before any enrichment). |
| **latitude** | number | Geographic latitude of the property. |
| **longitude** | number | Geographic longitude of the property. |
| **main_picture** | string | URL of the main listing image. |
| **monthly_price** | number | Monthly rent or price in euros. |
| **native_id** | integer | Native numeric ID matching the `id` field. |
| **nature** | integer | Transaction type code (e.g., `1` = rent, `2` = sale). |
| **picture_count** | integer | Total number of pictures available. |
| **pictures** | string | Comma-separated URLs of listing thumbnails. |
| **postal_code** | string | Postal code of the listing (e.g., “10800”). |
| **price** | number | Total listing price in euros. |
| **price_per_meter** | number or null | Price per square meter. |
| **publication_id** | string | Internal publication ID for this listing. |
| **short_description** | string | A brief excerpt or summary of the listing. |
| **tags** | string or null | Highlight tags (e.g., “180 m²”). |
| **title** | string | Headline or title of the listing. |
| **transaction_type** | integer | Numeric code for transaction type (e.g., sale vs. rent). |
| **url** | string | Direct link to the listing on SeLoger. |
| **video_url** | string or null | URL to any embedded video tour. |
| **virtual_visit_url** | string or null | URL for a virtual 3D visit, if available. |

response.name: Example
